display_text: Meepo Aghanim's Scepter: MegaMeepo Fling — Counters mobility and facilitates pick-offs by flinging a Meepo towards a target, dealing damage and slowing them. Enhances Meepo's role as a relentless hunter and initiator in chaotic teamfights.
search_text: Meepo Aghanim Scepter counter-mobility initiation pick-off MegaMeepo Fling

display_text: Meepo Aghanim's Shard: Dig — Counters burst damage and disables by making Meepo untargetable and invulnerable for 3 seconds while restoring health. Provides a survival mechanism against high-damage spikes and crowd control, ensuring Meepo's sustainability in prolonged engagements.
search_text: Meepo Aghanim Shard anti-burst disable avoidance sustain Dig invulnerability
